name: ai-ui-style-director
description: Agent workflow for recommending UI style directions, locking DESIGN.md, and guiding website generation.

scripts.check: node --check bin/ai-ui-style-director.mjs && node --check src/core.mjs && node --check src/preview.mjs && node --check src/loopback-server.mjs && node --check src/catalog-browser.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-style-previews.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-curated-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-generated-catalog.mjs && npm run catalog:curated:validate && npm run previews:check && npm run catalog:validate && npm test
scripts.recommend:demo: node bin/ai-ui-style-director.mjs recommend --brief "AI developer tool website" --count 5
